title: Risk Dashboard
formula: Composite = AI Bubble×0.30 + China Risk×0.30 + Global Risk×0.25 + Crypto Risk×0.15

analysis.pending: System starting, data is being prepared...

news.loading: News sources are connecting, please refresh later

authorityNotes: Global market data: Yahoo Finance + FRED (US Federal Reserve Economic Data)
China macro data: AkShare (East Money / NBS public data)
News sentiment: Yahoo Finance, BBC, Xinhua and other mainstream media RSS
Items marked "Historical baseline" are fallback fills without real-time data, not live quotes
fallbackDesc: Prioritize authoritative sources such as FRED (St. Louis Fed official), Yahoo Finance, Alpha Vantage, and AkShare (East Money and other public data). When real-time sources are temporarily unavailable, automatically fall back to the most recent real snapshot or historical baseline, and clearly label the source on the card to avoid fabricated volatility.
